svg.title: v1.13 explored target functions
svg.desc: Twelve target functions from the v1.13 paper-track campaign, each drawn as an unsmoothed blue polyline over its training domain with a per-target recovered count.
svg.text: One blue polyline per explored target. Lines are evaluated points connected directly; no smoothing and no fitted surrogate curve.
Each panel uses its own y-scale. Status is the number of v1.13 paper-track rows recovered out of the two rows run for that target.
green: at least one recovered row
